positive: Minimalist geometric pattern featuring intertwined constellations and stylized celestial bodies, designed as a seamless, repeating print. The design uses deep sapphire blues, gold leaf accents, and creamy off-white accents, giving it a luxurious, cosmic feel. The composition is central and balanced, with strong, clean silhouettes of stars and nebulae. Style should evoke Art Nouveau meets Modern Geometric, optimized for textile printing, high contrast, and clear outlines. Studio lighting, crisp focus, vector art quality.
negative: blur, noisy, text, watermark, logo, signature, blurry, messy, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts
